description: A grand interior hall illuminated by a large crystal chandelier and candelabras. A man in dark clothing stands at center playing a flute before a music stand, accompanied by seated musicians with string instruments and a harpsichord to the right. An audience of elegantly dressed men and women in eighteenth-century attire sits and stands along the left side of the room. The ornate walls feature large paintings and gilded decorations. Warm candlelight bathes the entire scene.

_meta.title: Flute Concert with Frederick the Great at Sanssouci
